body_excerpt:
ASUS has released an important security update for the ASUS System Control Interface, the service for the MyASUS . 
To address recent security vulnerabilities, the latest version has been updated to 3.1.61.0 for x64 architecture and 3.2.62.0 for ARM architecture. 
This update applies to all personal computers, including desktops, laptops, NUCs, and All-in-One PCs. 
Users can receive this update automatically by opening the MyASUS app with an active internet connection or via Windows Update.
 
CVE-2026-7480
CVSS 4.0 Score：7.3 / HIGH
AV:L/AC:H/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Security Update for ASUS System Control Interface
